questions.question: Which tab is used to change font style?
questions.explanation: Font style options are available in the Home tab.

questions.question: Which option is used to underline text?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+U applies underline formatting.

questions.question: Which key is used to create a new document?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+N creates a new document.

questions.question: Which key opens an existing document?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+O opens an existing document.

questions.question: Which option is used to italicize text?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+I applies italic formatting.

questions.question: Which tab contains clipboard tools?
questions.explanation: Clipboard tools (cut, copy, paste) are in the Home tab.

questions.question: Which key is used to cut text?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+X cuts selected text.

questions.question: Which key combination is used to redo an action?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+Y redoes the last undone action.

questions.question: Which option changes text alignment to right?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+R aligns text to the right.

questions.question: Which option highlights text with color?
questions.explanation: Highlight is used to mark text with color.

questions.question: Which tab is used to insert shapes?
questions.explanation: Shapes are inserted from the Insert tab.

questions.question: Which key is used to close a document?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+W closes the current document.

questions.question: Which option inserts a page break?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+Enter inserts a page break.

questions.question: Which tab contains spelling and grammar check?
questions.explanation: Spelling & grammar tools are in the Review tab.

questions.question: Which option is used to insert a header?
questions.explanation: Headers are inserted from the Insert tab.

questions.question: Which option is used to insert a footer?
questions.explanation: Footers are inserted via Insert tab.

questions.question: Which option changes text case?
questions.explanation: Change Case converts text between uppercase/lowercase.

questions.question: Which option is used to zoom in/out?
questions.explanation: Zoom controls are available in the View tab.

questions.question: Which key moves cursor to next line?
questions.explanation: Enter moves cursor to next line.

questions.question: Which option is used to insert date and time?
questions.explanation: Date & Time is inserted from Insert tab.

questions.question: Which key deletes text to the left?
questions.explanation: Backspace deletes characters to the left.

questions.question: Which option changes font size?
questions.explanation: Font Size adjusts text size.

questions.question: Which tab contains page setup options?
questions.explanation: Page setup is under Layout tab.

questions.question: Which option inserts a textbox?
questions.explanation: Text boxes are added from Insert tab.

questions.question: Which option is used to view ruler?
questions.explanation: Ruler visibility is controlled in View tab.

questions.question: Which tab contains Word Count?
questions.explanation: Word Count is available in Review tab.

questions.question: Which option is used to insert symbols?
questions.explanation: Symbols are inserted from Insert tab.

questions.question: Which option is used to create a bulleted list?
questions.explanation: Bullets create unordered lists.

questions.question: Which option is used to create numbered list?
questions.explanation: Numbering creates ordered lists.

questions.question: Which option increases indentation?
questions.explanation: Increase Indent moves text further from margin.

questions.question: Which key is used to open Print dialog?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+P opens the Print dialog.

questions.question: Which tab is used to insert tables?
questions.explanation: Tables are inserted from the Insert tab.

questions.question: Which option is used to change page orientation?
questions.explanation: Page orientation is changed from the Layout tab.

questions.question: Which key is used to save document with a new name?
questions.explanation: F12 opens Save As dialog.

questions.question: Which option is used to change page margins?
questions.explanation: Margins are adjusted in the Layout tab.

questions.question: Which key is used to select entire document?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+A selects all content.

questions.question: Which option is used to insert page numbers?
questions.explanation: Page numbers are inserted from Insert tab.

questions.question: Which key is used to undo an action?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+Z undoes the last action.

questions.question: Which option is used to insert a picture?
questions.explanation: Pictures are inserted via Insert tab.

questions.question: Which tab contains paragraph settings?
questions.explanation: Paragraph settings are in Home tab.

questions.question: Which option is used to align text center?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+E aligns text to center.

questions.question: Which option is used to insert a hyperlink?
questions.explanation: Hyperlinks are inserted via Insert tab.

questions.question: Which key is used to find text?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+F opens find dialog.

questions.question: Which option is used to replace text?
questions.explanation: Ctrl+H opens find and replace.

questions.question: Which key is used to insert a new line without paragraph break?
questions.explanation: Shift+Enter inserts line break.

questions.question: Which tab is used to change themes?
questions.explanation: Themes are applied from Design tab.

questions.question: Which option is used to view document in full screen?
questions.explanation: Read Mode provides full-screen view.

questions.question: Which option is used to insert shapes?
questions.explanation: Shapes are added via Insert tab.

questions.question: Which key moves cursor to next tab space?
questions.explanation: Tab key moves cursor forward.

questions.question: Which option is used to insert a watermark?
questions.explanation: Watermarks are added via Design tab.
